news.summary: In Melbourne, Florida, Rossby Financial Advisors have unveiled a new unified dashboard created by Milemarker. This innovative tool allows advisors to leverage the power of their data effectively, enabling them to expand their practices.
news.headline: Rossby Financial advisors in Melbourne, Fla., now have access to a unified dashboard from Milemarker to leverage data and scale practices.

news.summary: Tether and Adecoagro are teaming up to investigate renewable energy-driven Bitcoin mining in Brazil. The partnership seeks to improve energy efficiency and strengthen decentralized networks in the region. The initiative could potentially have a significant impact on the renewable energy sector in Brazil, as well as on the Bitcoin mining industry.
news.headline: Adecoagro partners with Tether for renewable Bitcoin mining in Brazil, focusing on energy efficiency and decentralized networks.

news.summary: In Germany, Geekvape marked its 10th anniversary by organizing the G-Tour Nürburgring 2025 on June 21–22, in collaboration with the Porsche racing team. The event, held at Nürburgring, brought together global partners for a unique experience fusing racing heritage with advanced vaping tech. The Scherer PHX GT team, embodying Geekvape's core values, was a focal point of the event.Celebrating a decade in the industry, Geekvape aimed to merge high performance with innovation, engaging participants in an immersive blend of motorsport and cutting-edge vaping equipment.
news.headline: Geekvape celebrates 10th Anniversary at Nürburgring with G-Tour 2025, partnering with Porsche racing team for innovative event.

news.summary: Amber International Holding Limited (Nasdaq: AMBR) has seen strong investor confidence as institutions subscribe at a rate of US$10.45 per ADS. The company, a top provider of institutional crypto financial services, is experiencing significant support from investors.
news.headline: Amber International secures $25.5M in private placement at $10.45 per ADS, showcasing investor confidence.

news.summary: The International Monetary Fund (IMF) has allegedly rejected Pakistan's proposal to utilize low-cost electricity for cryptocurrency mining, cautioning that it has the potential to disrupt the energy sector. The exact figures and details of the plan were not disclosed.
news.headline: IMF stops Pakistan's Bitcoin mining project with power subsidies due to fears of energy market instability.

news.summary: A new report titled "The Wholesale and Retail of Food in South Africa 2025" has been published and is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report provides detailed insights into the wholesale and retail sectors of the food industry in South Africa, with a focus on wholesalers, retailers, informal traders, and buying groups. Key aspects covered in the report include data on retail, food, and wholesale revenue, as well as volumes, consumption patterns, employment figures, food prices, and food security issues. The report also delves into major trends impacting the industry such as discount retail and the rise of online shopping.
news.headline: Report on South Africa food market by 2025 includes profiles of major players like Shoprite, Pick n Pay, Woolworths and more, covering retail and wholesale revenue, volumes, consumption, employment, food prices, and trends like discount retail and online.

news.summary: A significant accumulation of potential short liquidations around the $111,320 mark has the potential to initiate a squeeze, which could propel Bitcoin to enter its next substantial price increase as it continues towards uncharted territory.
news.headline: BTC surged 80% when funding rates turned negative. $111,320 could trigger short liquidations, pushing Bitcoin higher.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, Boldyn Networks (Boldyn), a prominent company specializing in private networks and shared communication infrastructure on a global scale, was acknowledged as a Major Player in the IDC MarketScape report titled "European Enterprise Private 5G Solutions 2025 Vendor Assessment" (document number EUR253555324). This recognition signifies Boldyn's significant presence and impact in the European market for private 5G solutions, showcasing its position as a key contributor in this industry.
news.headline: Boldyn Networks recognized as Major Player in IDC MarketScape for European Enterprise Private 5G Solutions.

news.summary: In July, there could be a potential shift in the crypto markets, with analysts focusing on Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) and its movement around the $110,000 threshold to determine if the market will break higher or remain stagnant. Iliya Kalchev, an analyst at Nexo Dispatch, believes this summer may deviate from the typical slowdown observed between July and September in previous years. Kalchev highlighted the consistent inflow into crypto exchange-traded funds (ETFs) and ongoing corporate accumulation of Bitcoin and Ethereum, laying the groundwork for further upward movement. He emphasized that long-term holders are not showing any signs of selling off, indicating sustained confidence in the market's future. Kalchev also noted the steady growth of the U.S. money supply (M2), which recently surpassed $21.9 trillion, a significant liquidity level that historically bolsters risk assets such as cryptocurrencies. Derivatives markets also show promising signs... (The full article can be found on Benzinga.com)
news.headline: July could see bullish trend in Bitcoin and Ethereum. Bitcoin's movement around $110,000 crucial. Inflows into crypto ETFs and corporate accumulation of Bitcoin and Ethereum increasing. U.S. money supply crossed $21.9 trillion, supporting risk assets. Long-term holders remain confident in market's prospects.

news.summary: The CEO of ChinaAMC has announced the company's goal to utilize its asset allocation knowledge in creating a user-friendly solution. In a press release on July 3, 2025 in Beijing, ChinaAMC provided a complimentary index analytics tool to index investors in China. The tool offers powerful insights and is available at no cost to users. China Asset Management, also known as ChinaAMC, is taking steps to better serve its clients by providing essential resources for informed investing decisions.
news.headline: ChinaAMC offers free index analytics tool to Chinese investors, aiming to convert expertise into solution.

news.summary: A recent event in Cannes, the Based Rollup Summit, showcased developments in Ethereum scalability. The summit specifically emphasized advancements such as preconfirmations and booster rollups designed to improve user experience and uphold decentralization. The event attracted a significant number of participants and discussions revolved around implementing these technologies to increase utility for users.
news.headline: Recent Ethereum Scalability Summit in Cannes discussed advancements in technology like preconfirmations & booster rollups to improve user experience.

news.summary: Pryon has garnered industry recognition for its expertise in addressing the primary obstacle to enterprise AI profitability by establishing a dependable memory base for autonomous solutions. The company, based in New York, received this acknowledgment on July 3, 2025. Pryon is acclaimed as the top provider of memory solutions for enterprise AI, showcasing its leadership in this field.
news.headline: Pryon wins "AI Data Management Solution of the Year" for innovative AI Memory Layer tech, aiding in boosting enterprise AI ROI.

news.summary: In June, the official U.S. jobs report showed a significant improvement with nonfarm payrolls increasing by 147,000, the highest monthly rise in 2025. This figure surpassed economists' expectations of 110,000 and was a notable increase from the revised 144,000 in May. The unemployment rate also declined to 4.1% from 4.2%, defying predictions of a rise to 4.3% and marking the lowest rate since January 2025. Government hiring notably added 73,000 new jobs, the most since March 2024. State governments contributed 47,000 jobs, primarily in the education sector. Meanwhile, private sector growth showed signs of slowing down.
news.headline: US labor market stronger than expected in June - nonfarm payrolls up by 147,000, lowest unemployment rate at 4.1% since Jan 2025.

news.summary: Last year, a total of 2,500 new cases of a rare medical condition were reported across the country. This marks a significant increase from the previous year, which saw only 1,200 cases. Health officials are closely monitoring the situation and urging the public to seek medical attention if they experience any symptoms associated with the illness. The spike in cases has prompted further research into potential causes and treatment options for the condition. The government has allocated $1.5 million in funding for research and support services for individuals affected by the illness. Overall, the increase in cases has raised concerns among healthcare professionals and the general public about the prevalence and impact of this rare medical condition.
news.headline: Revised national EPSO-G goals: focus on green energy, interconnections, resilience, security, and system flexibility.

news.summary: On July 2, 2025, Integrated Solutions for Systems, Inc. (IS4S) revealed the inauguration of its latest office in Concord, Mass. This move signifies the company’s venture into the New England region. The office began operations on June 1, 2025, and is strategically positioned for optimal accessibility. This expansion highlights IS4S’s commitment to growth and strengthens its presence in the market.
news.headline: Integrated Solutions for Systems, Inc. (IS4S) opens new office near Hanscom AFB on June 1st, 2025, expanding into New England.

news.summary: The Harland West Hollywood will be reintroduced as a for-sale condominium community led by Compass Development Marketing Group. Sales are set to launch this September in Los Angeles. Centurion Real Estate Partners made the announcement on July 3, 2025. The condo community is located at 702 N. and will offer modern living spaces.
news.headline: Centurion Real Estate Partners relaunches The Harland West Hollywood for sale, sales launch in September.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, an industry leader in advanced robotic pool cleaning technology, Beatbot, revealed exciting news about exclusive Prime Day discounts for its popular AquaSense 2 series. The sale, running from July 5 to July 20, offers customers substantial savings on AquaSense 2, showcasing the company's commitment to innovation and customer satisfaction.
news.headline: Beatbot offers Prime Day deals on AquaSense 2 pool cleaning robots, saving customers money from July 5-20.

news.summary: OSI Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ: OSIS) based in Hawthorne, California, revealed their participation in the CJS Securities 25th Annual Summer Conference on July 10, 2025. The conference, to be held at the Metropolis Country Club in White Plains, NY, will see the company presenting and conducting one-on-one meetings with investors. OSI Systems, Inc. is recognized as a vertically integrated provider of specialized electronic systems and components crucial for various industries.
news.headline: OSI Systems to attend CJS Securities 25th Annual Summer Conference on July 10, 2025. (NASDAQ: OSIS) Vertical designer and manufacturer.

news.summary: In an announcement from Grand Baie, Mauritius on July 3, 2025, Alphamin Resources Corp. shared an operational update. The company, listed as AFM on TSX Venture Exchange and APH on JSE AltX, reported positive developments. There was no specific detail provided regarding the contents of the operational update.
news.headline: Alphamin provides operational update for Q2 2025 and files amended constitution; based in Mauritius.

news.summary: In Amarillo, Texas, Cacique Foods, a prominent Hispanic foods company known for being the top brand of Mexican-style cheeses, cremas, chorizos, and salsas in the U.S., has appointed Pedro Silveira as CEO. Silveira brings with him 30 years of experience in the consumer-packaged goods sector. The company is focusing on enhancing its growth strategy, broadening distribution channels, and making investments in its workforce and infrastructure under Silveira's leadership. This change comes following Gil de Cardenas' tenure as CEO.
news.headline: Pedro Silveira named CEO of Cacique Foods, a top Hispanic foods company, with over 30 years experience in the industry.

news.summary: In Engelewood, Colorado, on July 3, 2025, XTI Aerospace, Inc. (Nasdaq: XTIA) revealed a partnership with MagLev Aero Inc. for technological collaboration. XTI, known for its innovative xVTOL and powered-lift aircraft solutions, aims to work with MagLev to advance their offerings. MagLev, distinguished for its magnetic technology, will bring unique expertise to the endeavor. This collaboration signifies a significant step forward for both companies, combining XTI's aviation prowess with MagLev's groundbreaking magnetically-driven innovations. This strategic partnership is anticipated to drive advancements in the aerospace industry and propel both companies to new heights of success.
news.headline: XTI Aerospace partners with MagLev Aero on new electric propulsion system, promising innovation in aircraft solutions.

news.summary: Toronto, July 3, 2025 - An upcoming press release on August 7, 2025, at 5:00 p.m. ET, will announce the Company's financial results for the second quarter of 2025. Following this release, an Investor Conference Call will be conducted by Executive Vice President Martin L. Juravsky to discuss the results.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia and Seoul, South Korea on July 3, 2025, BTQ Technologies Corp. introduced Dr. Sean Kwak as its newest addition. The global quantum technology company, trading under CBOE CA: BTQ, FSE: NG3, and OTCQX: BTQQF, specializes in safeguarding vital networks. Dr. Kwak will be stepping into a significant role within the organization.
news.headline: BTQ Technologies appoints Dr. Sean Kwak, Korea's leading expert in Quantum Technology, as strategic advisor. $BTQ.

news.summary: Interface, Inc. declared that it will reveal its second quarter 2025 results on Friday, August 1, 2025, before the market opens. The release will coincide with a conference call scheduled for the same morning at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time. During this call, which will be broadcast live online, Laurel M. Hurd, the Chief Executive Officer, and Bruce A. Hausmann, the Chief Financial Officer, will address investors and analysts. The company's stock is listed on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol TILE.
news.headline: Interface, Inc. (Nasdaq: TILE) to release Q2 2025 results on August 1, 2025, with a conference call hosted by CEO and CFO.

news.summary: Stamford, Connecticut - According to a report by ISG, enterprises are revolutionizing their approach to workforce management by implementing software powered by artificial intelligence and automation. This technology is designed to tackle various labor-related issues and capitalize on opportunities within the workforce.
news.headline: ISG reports that companies are using AI and automation in workforce management to tackle labor issues and opportunities.

news.summary: Nuvve Holding Corp. (NASDAQ: NVVE), a prominent player in vehicle-to-grid (V2G) technology and grid modernization, based in San Diego, has introduced Laura Huang and Brian Johnson to its Board of Directors. The recent appointments add considerable expertise, clocking in at a total of forty years, spanning academia, finance, and mobility innovation. These additions are expected to bolster the strategic direction and governance of the company. Gregor, a company representative, emphasized, "Laura and Brian are trailblazers in their respective fields, bringing diverse yet complementary skills to the table."
news.headline: Nuvve Holding Corp. appoints Laura Huang and Brian Johnson to Board of Directors, bringing expertise in finance and innovation.

(Nasdaq: TW), a prominent global operator of electronic marketplaces for rates, credit, equities, and money markets, is set to announce its financial outcomes for the second quarter of 2025 on Wednesday, July 30, 2025, approximately at 7:00 AM EDT. news.summary: In New York, Olo Inc. (NYSE: OLO), a prominent open SaaS platform for restaurants, has disclosed an agreement to be bought by Thoma Bravo, a software investment firm. The deal, an all-cash transaction, values Olo at around $2.0 billion in equity. This acquisition is anticipated to boost Olo's expansion and enhance its services for the 750+ restaurant brands it caters to worldwide.
news.headline: Olo, a restaurant SaaS platform, to be acquired by Thoma Bravo for $2.0 billion in all-cash deal, boosting growth and services.

news.headline: SEKKISEI launches Limited Edition SAVE THE BLUE Lotion in 2025 to support ocean conservation, benefiting coral reefs globally.

The insights provided aim to shed light on the future trends and behaviors in the industry.

news.summary: TCL, a global leader in smart home technology, has introduced the D2 Series Smart Locks in New York on July 3, 2025. This series includes three models, with the flagship being the TCL D2 Pro Palm Vein Smart Lock. These smart locks are equipped with AI-powered local storage and various versatile smart features to enhance security and convenience.
news.headline: TCL launches D2 Series Smart Locks, featuring D2 Pro Palm Vein Smart Lock with 0.3-Second Unlocking.

news.summary: Verdantas, a top player in digitally-enhanced technical consulting services for environmental, water, and energy transition sectors and backed by Sterling Investment Partners, recently completed the acquisition of Independent Solutions, Inc., a company based in California. The deal, finalized on July 3, 2025, marks a significant move for Verdantas as it expands its portfolio and strengthens its position in the market. This strategic acquisition is part of Verdantas' growth strategy and underscores its commitment to providing innovative solutions in these critical industries.
news.headline: Verdantas, supported by Sterling Investment Partners, acquires Independent Solutions, Inc. to expand environmental services in West healthcare market.

news.summary: This week in Redmond, Washington, Nintendo announced new content available for download on the Nintendo Switch. This includes a classic game originally released for the Nintendo GameCube in 2005, called Super Mario Strikers. In this intense soccer game, players like Mario compete in fast-paced matches using familiar items such as shells and mushrooms. The game offers simple controls, making it easy for players to quickly jump into matches and improve their skills. The Nintendo Download provides access to this nostalgic game experience for fans of the series.
news.headline: Nintendo Download features Super Mario Strikers for Nintendo GameCube, a soccer game released in 2005. Fast-paced action with familiar items.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, Bluerock revealed plans for a shareholder liquidity event concerning its primary real estate fund, the Bluerock Total Income+ Real Estate Fund (TI+ or Fund). The Fund's Board unanimously recommended the proposed liquidity event, which aims to convert a certain percentage of shares into cash at a price equal to the Fund's net asset value. This event is expected to provide shareholders the opportunity to redeem up to 5% of outstanding shares annually without redemption fees. Additionally, this plan is set to enhance liquidity and offer an annual tender offer for up to 20% of outstanding shares.
news.headline: Bluerock plans liquidity event for Real Estate Fund, unanimously recommended by Board.
